scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n BACKEND,WORKER,FRONTEND,TUNNEL -c blue,magenta,green,gray "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:worker" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run tunnel"
scripts.infra: concurrently -k -n OTP,PHOTON,TUNNEL -c cyan,yellow,gray "npm run otp" "npm run photon" "npm run tunnel"
scripts.dev:worker: cd frontend && wrangler pages dev dist --persist-to .wrangler-state --live-reload
